testcase.name: test_grandfathered_null_for_anon

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 10.0 is None + where 10.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff42f252bb00>('your_grandfathered_price_usd') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff42f252bb00> = {'base_price_usd': 9.99, 'current_price_usd': 9.99, 'next_price_increase_to_usd': 10.49, 'quarters_since_launch': 0, ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_iter_global_vibez_dsg_2026_01_safestakes_extra.py:106: in test_grandfathered_null_for_anon assert body.get("your_grandfathered_price_usd") is None E AssertionError: assert 10.0 is None E + where 10.0 = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff42f252bb00>('your_grandfathered_price_usd') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff42f252bb00> = {'base_price_usd': 9.99, 'current_price_usd': 9.99, 'next_price_increase_to_usd': 10.49, 'quarters_since_launch': 0, ...}.get
